title: To codify Executive Order 14158 relating to establishing and implementing the President's Department of Government Efficiency.
plain_summary: This bill turns a presidential order into an official law. The presidential order created something called the Department of Government Efficiency. This department's job is to help make the government work better and waste less money. By making it a law instead of just a presidential order, it becomes more permanent and harder to change. The bill gives this department the same power as other laws that Congress passes.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.

sections.title: Section 1 Codifying Executive Order 14158 relating to establishing and implementing the President's Department of Government Efficiency
sections.text: Executive Order 14158 (which can be found in volume 90 of the Federal Register on page 8441 and deals with creating and running the President's Department of Government Efficiency) will now have the same power as a law passed by Congress.
